choices.text: Because it was raining, so we stayed home.
Because it was raining, we stayed home.
Because it was raining, but we stayed home.
Because it was raining, although we stayed home.

questions.explanation: Использование 'because' и 'so' в одном предложении недопустимо. Правильный вариант: 'Because it was raining, we stayed home.'

choices.text: Although it was cold, but we went out.
Although it was cold, we went out.
Although it was cold, so we went out.
Although it was cold, and we went out.

questions.explanation: Использование 'although' и 'but' в одном предложении недопустимо. Правильный вариант: 'Although it was cold, we went out.'

choices.text: Because the bus was late, so we missed the train.
Because the bus was late, we missed the train.
Because the bus was late, but we missed the train.
Because the bus was late, although we missed the train.

questions.explanation: Использование 'because' и 'so' в одном предложении запрещено. Правильный вариант: 'Because the bus was late, we missed the train.'

choices.text: Although it was windy, but we played soccer.
Although it was windy, we played soccer.
Although it was windy, so we played soccer.
Although it was windy, and we played soccer.

questions.explanation: Союзы 'although' и 'but' не могут использоваться вместе. Правильный вариант: 'Although it was windy, we played soccer.'

choices.text: Because she was tired, so she went to bed.
Because she was tired, she went to bed.
Because she was tired, but she went to bed.
Because she was tired, although she went to bed.

questions.explanation: Использование 'because' и 'so' в одном предложении неверно. Правильный вариант: 'Because she was tired, she went to bed.'

choices.text: Although it was expensive, but we bought it.
Although it was expensive, we bought it.
Although it was expensive, so we bought it.
Although it was expensive, and we bought it.

questions.explanation: Использование 'although' и 'but' в одном предложении недопустимо. Правильный вариант: 'Although it was expensive, we bought it.'

choices.text: Because the meeting was canceled, so we had a free afternoon.
Because the meeting was canceled, we had a free afternoon.
Because the meeting was canceled, but we had a free afternoon.
Because the meeting was canceled, although we had a free afternoon.

questions.explanation: В предложении не должно быть 'because' и 'so' одновременно. Правильный вариант: 'Because the meeting was canceled, we had a free afternoon.'

choices.text: Although it was raining, but we went for a walk.
Although it was raining, we went for a walk.
Although it was raining, so we went for a walk.
Although it was raining, and we went for a walk.

questions.explanation: Союзы 'although' и 'but' не могут использоваться вместе. Правильный вариант: 'Although it was raining, we went for a walk.'

choices.text: Because he was sick, so he stayed home.
Because he was sick, he stayed home.
Because he was sick, but he stayed home.
Because he was sick, although he stayed home.

questions.explanation: Использование 'because' и 'so' в одном предложении запрещено. Правильный вариант: 'Because he was sick, he stayed home.'

choices.text: Although it was dark, but we continued walking.
Although it was dark, we continued walking.
Although it was dark, so we continued walking.
Although it was dark, and we continued walking.

questions.explanation: Использование 'although' и 'but' в одном предложении неверно. Правильный вариант: 'Although it was dark, we continued walking.'
